programme.title: After the First 48
programme.desc: After a violent melee leaves two young men brutally gunned down, Mobile detectives track down multiple suspects to piece together what happened; without an eyewitness, the prosecution must rely on the defendants themselves to reveal the truth.

programme.title: After the First 48
programme.desc: When a vulnerable woman is shot to death, witnesses are hesitant to help Tulsa detectives clinch the case; at trial, the defense questions their reliability and claims the prosecution has accused the wrong man.

programme.title: After the First 48
programme.desc: After a beloved Mobile man is gunned down in his front yard, conflicting eyewitness accounts leave detectives wondering if the suspect acted in self-defense; the prosecution needs the community the victim stood up for to come forward at trial.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Mobile, Ala., a 68-year-old woman goes missing after checking into a casino where she had lost millions.

programme.title: The First 48

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Castle and Beckett investigate the murder of a singer whose body has been left arranged in the same style as in one of his music videos.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: When a courier is killed while delivering a package, Castle and Beckett's investigations lead them to a murder covered-up years before.

programme.title: Love Nature

programme.title: Love Nature

programme.title: Michael Portillo in Stockholm

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts

programme.title: My Boyfriend Made Me Do It
